title: Multiple label redefinition/parsing issue for constant functions used in computational loops

features.name: constant function direct use in array dimension and loop bound
features.description: Code should include a constant function used directly in both an unpacked array dimension declaration and a for loop bound expression within the same scope

features.name: constant function in for loop bound expression
features.description: Code should include a constant function used directly as the bound expression in a for loop

features.name: constant function in unpacked array dimension
features.description: Code should include a constant function used directly as the dimension size of an unpacked array
